    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DoublyLinkedList<TopArtistRowData>
    TopArtistsViewModel.buildAllArtistsRankedData()
    Builds all artist rows for the analytics modal synchronously, ranked by total listening time descending.
    List<TopArtistRowData>
    TopArtistsViewModel.buildTopArtistsData(int limit)
    Builds and returns a ranked list of top artist rows synchronously, ranked by total listening time descending, bounded to limit rows.
    Method parameters in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel with type arguments of type TopArtistRowData
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    TopArtistsViewModel.loadTopArtistsData(Consumer<List<TopArtistRowData>> onSuccess, int limit)
    Loads a ranked list of top artists asynchronously for display in a preview or panel, delivering results to onSuccess on the JavaFX thread.
